dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The day started like any other. The usual morning announcements. The usual boredom of first period. Then, the screams.

dialogue.speaker: JISU
dialogue.line: (sobbing, barely a whisper) I want my mom… I want to go home…

dialogue.speaker: HAE-MIN
dialogue.line: (thought) *The sounds… they’re getting closer. Thumping. Growling. Not human.*

dialogue.speaker: HAE-MIN
dialogue.line: (thought) *The classroom door… it’s not going to hold.*

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A grotesque hand, fingers unnaturally long and twisted, burst through the splintered wood. Then, a face.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SHATTER! (The door rips from its hinges)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The hallway was a nightmare. More of them. Students, teachers… twisted into something monstrous. The air thick with the smell of blood and fear.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SCREAMS! DISTANT ROARS! WET RIPPING SOUNDS!

dialogue.speaker: HAE-MIN
dialogue.line: (thought) *I can’t help them. I can’t. Just run.*

dialogue.speaker: HAE-MIN
dialogue.line: (whispering, trembling) What… what are these things? What’s happening?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: He peered out the window. The city, once vibrant, was now a canvas of smoke and fire. Sirens wailed, then abruptly died, replaced by an eerie silence.

dialogue.speaker: HAE-MIN
dialogue.line: (thought) *The world… it’s gone. Everything is gone.*

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: His eyes fell on a discarded poster, half-torn from the wall. A hunting rifle, advertised for a local sporting goods store. A weapon.

dialogue.speaker: HAE-MIN
dialogue.line: (curling into a ball, shaking) I just want to go home…

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: DISTANT ROAR. A low, continuous GROAN from somewhere in the school.

summary: Hae-min, a terrified student, hides with a classmate as their school is overrun by grotesque, transformed humans. After a brutal encounter with a mutated teacher, he escapes into the chaotic hallways and witnesses the horror unfolding, realizing the entire city is under attack and he needs a weapon to survive.
